bullets: Maintained and extended a Laravel and Vue.js SaaS platform end-to-end across PHP back-end, GraphQL APIs, MySQL, and front-end features.
Owned LEMP-style AWS infrastructure (Nginx, MySQL, PHP) and migrated local and cloud environments to Docker.
Reduced AWS costs by over $6,000/month through infrastructure refinements.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines and GitHub Actions workflows.
Gathered requirements directly from veterinary clients and shipped features through platform end-of-life after acquisition.
Shipped 11+ web applications end-to-end using PHP (Laravel and Lumen), Vue.js, and MySQL or PostgreSQL.
Built responsive, accessible front-end components with Tailwind CSS and vanilla JavaScript, meeting WCAG standards.
Replaced legacy institutional systems and automated manual workflows across HR, academic departments, and student services.
Built system integrations including cron-based sync from network-restricted Oracle databases with multi-table joins.
Ran requirement-gathering with non-technical stakeholders, translating operational needs into reliable software.

projects.name: L.I.V.E. Outreach
projects.tech: Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Keystatic, Cloudflare
projects.description: Built and launched a full nonprofit website with an in-browser CMS, automated social share cards, structured data for search and AI discoverability, and a 100/100 accessibility score on every page. Runs on nonprofit-eligible tiers for approximately $15/year.

projects.name: Hippo Manager 2.0
projects.tech: Laravel, Vue.js, GraphQL, MySQL, Amazon Web Services (AWS), Docker, Tailwind CSS
projects.description: Cloud-based SaaS platform for veterinary clinics covering billing, scheduling, client management, reporting, and treatments. Laravel back-end on a LEMP-style AWS stack with MySQL persistence.
